# Site Prompt Pack (Generated)

Use these prompts with your preferred generation flow.

## 1) Product Landing Page

> Build a modern SaaS landing page with hero, features, pricing section, FAQ, and email capture form. Provide `index.html`, `style.css`, and `script.js`. Keep styles responsive and accessible.

## 2) Technical Blog

> Create a minimal blog homepage with searchable post cards, sticky top bar, and dark mode friendly colors. Output `index.html`, `style.css`, `script.js`.

## 3) Documentation Hub

> Generate a docs hub with left sidebar navigation, quickstart section, API table, and code examples. Output `index.html`, `style.css`, `script.js`.

## 4) Portfolio Site

> Build a professional portfolio site with intro hero, project cards, skills section, and contact form. Include smooth scrolling and form feedback in `script.js`.

## 5) Multi-page Creative Studio

> Create a 3-page static site: `index.html`, `gallery.html`, `contact.html` with shared `style.css` and `script.js`. Keep navigation links consistent across pages.

## Output rules

- Never include remote JS frameworks unless explicitly requested.
- Keep all files static and portable.
- Add `metadata.json` with `name`, `description`, `pages`, `features`, and `files`.
